CustomField.description: Maximum Rent times Lease Term or Assumed Utilization during the Term
CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Rent_Up_To__c), 'MO', ROUND(leaseworks__Lease_Term_MO__c,1) * leaseworks__Rent_Up_To_Amount__c , 'FH', leaseworks__Assumed_Monthly_FH__c * ROUND(leaseworks__Lease_Term_MO__c,1) * leaseworks__Rent_Up_To_Amount__c, 'FC', leaseworks__Assumed_Monthly_FC__c * ROUND(leaseworks__Lease_Term_MO__c,1) * leaseworks__Rent_Up_To_Amount__c, null)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum Rent times Lease Term or Assumed Utilization during the Term
CustomField.label: Total Contract Amount
